meanings.definition: a party of people assembled to promote sociability and communal activity
relating to human society and its members
living together or enjoying life in communities or organized groups
examples: a human being is a social animal

meanings.definition: relating to or belonging to or characteristic of high society
examples: made fun of her being so social and high-toned

meanings.definition: composed of sociable people or formed for the purpose of sociability
examples: the church has a large social hall

meanings.definition: tending to move or live together in groups or colonies of the same kind
marked by friendly companionship with others
